dm_location: Chapter 12 — Development Management Standards (Volume I, Written Statement)
sightline_y: 215 m national; 160 m regional; 90 m local (Figure 12.4)
wastewater_standard: Individual systems (septic tank + percolation area or patent treatment system); site-specific analysis required for non-serviced lands (12.12)
residential_density_dph: Determined with reference to Sustainable Residential Development in Urban Areas Guidelines; authority discretion in varying maximum density standards (no fixed uph table)
site_coverage_pct: Should not exceed 75% for industrial or retail; 80% may be permissible in town centre locations
public_open_space_pct: 15% of gross site area greenfield; 10% brownfield
car_parking_dwelling: Residential (1-3 bed): 1.5 per unit; Residential (4+ bed): 2 per unit; visitor: 1 per 3 dwelling units (minimum spaces)
trigger_AA: Natura Impact Statement may be required to inform AA process where proposal could affect a European Site
trigger_EIA: EIAR among assessments required; submitted where development exceeds relevant thresholds (extractive/larger development)
trigger_FRA: Site Specific FRA may be required where lands liable to flooding, per Flood Risk Management Guidelines 2009 (12.14)
trigger_AHIA: Architectural Assessment listed; controls for works to/change of use of protected structures
trigger_EcIA: Ecological Assessment listed among assessments required (12.5)
trigger_VIA: Landscape Appraisal and Visual Impact Assessment listed among assessments required (12.5)
trigger_TTA: Traffic and Transport Assessment listed among assessments required (12.5)
notes: No numeric rural minimum site area, private open space, separation distance, plot ratio or building height in Chapter 12. New rural entrance junction distances: 150 m national primary; 100 m national secondary/regional; 40 m local primary. Childcare: 1 facility per 75 units.
